text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the academy<n>when I hear
someone talking.
Siiigh... My heart's pounding... Iwonder if they'll confess their love toeach other after this part.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I follow the voice and find Mejiro<n>Ryan hiding out
of sight, secretly<n>reading a manga.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Man, this artist's stuff is the best...<n>All right! I'm
gonna get the whole<n>series and binge-read 'em
all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what the?! H-how long have<n>you been
standing there?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I-it's a romance manga but, uhhh...<n>Oh, yeah! A
friend of mine suggested I<n>check out this series,
and I didn't<n>wanna be rude and not read it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I came across an old<n>series by my
favorite artist and<n>decided to buy it or anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, I don't usually<n>read romance
manga! I mean, a gym<n>rat like me liking romance
manga? Pfft,<n>no way, right? Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The only reason I was thinking of<n>bingeing the
whole series is so I can<n>tell my friend what I
think about it<n>ASAP... Honest!
choice_data_list: It'd be better to pace yourself.
You'll exhaust yourself trying to binge it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If I don't get enough<n>sleep, then I
won't be able to train to<n>my full potential...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna read it, but I guess I'll hold<n>off... Huh,
that's kinda like holding off<n>on making a move
during a race to<n>save energy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll read at a reasonable pace!<n>But don't
forget—I'm only reading it<n>because my friend
recommended it to<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's reading or racing, pacing<n>yourself is
extremely important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Aww, but I really wanna read it all—er,<n>I mean... I
really wanna tell my friend<n>what I think about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'll adjust my schedule so<n>that I can rest
up after my<n>binge-reading session!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It sucks to have to do this, but things<n>should
work out if I move my morning<n>weight training to
another time slot!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I still think not binge-reading theseries would be the most sensibleoption, but at least she's finding timefor a proper rest.
